name: HYPNOSISMIC -Division Rap Battle- Rhyme Anima
original_name: ヒプノシスマイク-Division Rap Battle- Rhyme Anima
overview: Legendary rap group The Dirty Dawg could have taken Japan by storm, but then they broke up. Now each member fights in one of the four rival groups. Battles for turf are fought with rap and the Hypnosis Mic, a microphone that can affect the human spirit.
